description: Configures tiered Google Workspace password policies via organizational units. Creates three OUs: Admin (strictest), Employee, and Service Account. Each OU documents the intended complexity, history, and rotation requirements scaled to the sensitivity of the account type.

risk_profile_effects.standard: 12-character min for employees, 14-character min for admins. 90-day rotation for users, 60-day for admins. 8 previous passwords blocked.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: 14-character min for employees, 16-character min for admins. 60-day rotation for users, 45-day for admins. 12 previous passwords blocked.
risk_profile_effects.strict: 16-character min for employees, 18-character min for admins. 45-day rotation for users, 30-day for admins. 24 previous passwords blocked.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your organization's security tier. Controls default password complexity, rotation intervals, and reuse restrictions.

password_min_length.label: Minimum Password Length (employees)
password_min_length.client_description: Minimum password length for end users. NIST SP 800-63B recommends at least 8 characters; most compliance frameworks require 8-12. Longer is better.

password_max_age_days.label: Password Rotation Interval (days)
password_max_age_days.client_description: How often end users must change their password. Set to 0 to disable mandatory rotation. NIST recommends against mandatory rotation unless compromise is detected.

password_reuse_count.label: Password Reuse Count
password_reuse_count.client_description: Number of previous passwords a user cannot reuse. Prevents cycling through a small set of variations.

password_enforce_strong.label: Enforce Strong Passwords
password_enforce_strong.client_description: Require passwords to include mixed case, numbers, and symbols. Enabled for all risk profiles by default.

admin_password_min_length.label: Minimum Admin Password Length
admin_password_min_length.client_description: Minimum password length for admin accounts. Always higher than end-user minimum.

admin_password_max_age_days.label: Admin Password Rotation Interval (days)
admin_password_max_age_days.client_description: How often admin accounts must rotate passwords. Shorter than end-user interval due to higher risk.

outputs.admin_policy_ou_path: OU path for admin password policy scoping
outputs.employee_policy_ou_path: OU path for employee password policy scoping
outputs.service_account_ou_path: OU path for service account password policy scoping
outputs.effective_password_min_length: The resolved minimum password length for employees
outputs.effective_admin_password_min_length: The resolved minimum password length for admins
